subcodes.first_line: God, our Lord and the Lord of heaven and earth, hath testified that there is none other god but Him, the One, the Incomparable, the Omnipotent, the Unconstrained.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله ربنا و رب الارض و السماء انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
